# techme

The goal of `techme` is to supply basic data sets and toolsets to
generate research report( 《中国旱区农业技术发展报告》).

## Installation

And the development version from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("huhuaping/techme")
```

# Package index

## Data Subset from the Agriculture Yearbook

Data sets assembled from the Agriculture Yearbook（农业统计年鉴）.

- [`AgriFertilizer`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/AgriFertilizer.md)
  : Data Set of Agricultural Fertilizer
- [`AgriMachine`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/AgriMachine.md)
  : Data Set of Agricultural Machine
- [`AgriPesticide`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/AgriPesticide.md)
  : Data Set of Agricultural Pesticide
- [`AgriPlastic`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/AgriPlastic.md)
  : Data Set of Agricultural Plastic

## Data Subset from the Technology Yearbook

Data sets assembled from the Technology Yearbook（科技统计年鉴）. While
`PublicBudget` source from the National Yearbook, and `HitechFirmsPub`
source from the public site.

- [`IndustryOperation`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/IndustryOperation.md)
  : Data Set of Hi-tech Industry Operation
- [`IndustryRD`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/IndustryRD.md)
  : Data Set of Hi-tech Industry RD
- [`IndustryTrade`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/IndustryTrade.md)
  : Data Set of Hi-tech Industry Trade
- [`MarketPull`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/MarketPull.md)
  : Data Set of Tech Market Trade (Pull Effect)
- [`MarketPush`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/MarketPush.md)
  : Data Set of Tech Market Trade (Push Effect)
- [`RDActivity`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDActivity.md)
  : Data Set of RD Activity
- [`RDIntense`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDIntense.md)
  : Data Set of RD Intense
- [`RDLaborHour`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDLaborHour.md)
  : RD Personnel Full-time Equivalent by Region
- [`RDPaperInternational`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDPaperInternational.md)
  : International Scientific Papers by Region
- [`RDPatentAccept`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDPatentAccept.md)
  : Domestic Patent Applications Accepted by Region
- [`RDPatentAuthority`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDPatentAuthority.md)
  : Domestic Patent Grants by Region
- [`RDPatentValid`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDPatentValid.md)
  : Valid Domestic Patents by Region
- [`RDPlantVariety`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDPlantVariety.md)
  : Plant Variety Rights by Region
- [`RDSource`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/RDSource.md)
  : RD Expenditure by Funding Source by Region
- [`PublicBudget`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PublicBudget.md)
  : Data Set of Public Budget
- [`HitechFirmsPub`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/HitechFirmsPub.md)
  : Data Set of Hi-tech Firms Numbers on Public Site

## Data Subset from the public sources

Data sets assembled from the public sources, including
MOA（农业农村部）, MOST（科技部）, MOE（教育部） et. al.

- [`PubAgriParkList`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubAgriParkList.md)
  : Details of Approved List of National Agricultural Sci-tech Park
- [`PubAgriParkCheck`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubAgriParkCheck.md)
  : Details of Checking result of National Agricultural Sci-tech Park
- [`PubAgriParkEval`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubAgriParkEval.md)
  : Details of Evaluation result of National Agricultural Sci-tech Park
- [`PubCars`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubCars.md)
  : Details Data Frame of China Agricultural Research System (CARS)
- [`PubNKRDP`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubNKRDP.md)
  : Details of National Key R&D Plans(NKRDP)
- [`PubObsStation`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubObsStation.md)
  : Details list of Observe Stations of MOA and MOE
- [`PubObsStationX`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubObsStationX.md)
  : Details list of Observe Stations from departments( MOA/MOE/MOST)
- [`PubSKLMost`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubSKLMost.md)
  : Details of Stated Key Lab (SKL)
- [`HitechFirmsPub`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/HitechFirmsPub.md)
  : Data Set of Hi-tech Firms Numbers on Public Site
- [`PubAgrimodernZone`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubAgrimodernZone.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Agricultural Modernization Demonstration
  Zone.
- [`PubConvergenceAffirm`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubConvergenceAffirm.md)
  : Details of Affirmed List of National Agricultural Demonstration Park
- [`PubConvergenceCluster`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubConvergenceCluster.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Special and Advantage Industry Cluster
- [`PubConvergencePark`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubConvergencePark.md)
  : Details of Approved List of National Agricultural Demonstration Park
- [`PubConvergenceTown`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubConvergenceTown.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Strong Agri-industry Towns
- [`PubFirmLeader`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubFirmLeader.md)
  : National Key Leading Enterprises in Agricultural Industrialization
- [`PubFreshKeepCounty`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubFreshKeepCounty.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Spot Agri-products Fresh keeping test
  County
- [`PubGeneticResource`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubGeneticResource.md)
  : Details of Approved List of National Genetic Resource Base
- [`PubMachineCounty`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubMachineCounty.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Agricultural Machinery Demonstration
  County
- [`PubOpenShare`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubOpenShare.md)
  : Details of Evaluation Results for Major Scientific Infrastructure
  and Large-scale Scientific Instruments Sharing
- [`PubRuralInfoBase`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubRuralInfoBase.md)
  : Details of Approved List of Agricultural and Rural informational
  Demonstration Base
- [`PubSeedFirm`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubSeedFirm.md)
  : National Integrated Seed Production and Marketing Firms in China

## Data Subset for the special chapter

Data sets focus on special topics, including livestocks（畜牧业） et.
al.

- [`PubBreedingXmj`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubBreedingXmj.md)
  : Details of Officer Livestock Breeding List from MOA (Xmj)
- [`PubStandardXmj`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/PubStandardXmj.md)
  : Details of Officer Livestock Standard List from MOA (Xmj)
- [`LivestockBreeding`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/LivestockBreeding.md)
  : Date Set of Livestock Breeding
- [`MachineService`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/MachineService.md)
  : Agricultural Mechanization Services by Region

## Some elementary dataset used in the report

Basic information needed for data handling and report writing, including
Provinces, Regions, district, et. al.

- [`varsList`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/varsList.md)
  : Basic vars table
- [`ProvinceCity`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/ProvinceCity.md)
  : Data Set of Province and City of China
- [`BasicCountriesRegion`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/BasicCountriesRegion.md)
  : Data Set of Countries and Regions
- [`BasicDistrict`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/BasicDistrict.md)
  : Data Set of District information of China
- [`BasicProvince`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/BasicProvince.md)
  : Data Set of Basic Province information
- [`BasicTelAreaCode`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/BasicTelAreaCode.md)
  : Data Set of Telephone area code information of China
- [`BasicTelcode`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/BasicTelcode.md)
  : Data Set of Telephone area code information of China
- [`queryTianyan`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/queryTianyan.md)
  : Data Set of Institution Query from Tianyan Site

## Functions for raw data handling.

various funtions help to data cleaning, computation,summarising, et. al.

- [`add_footer_asis()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/add_footer_asis.md)
  : Add success footer information as whole part for the figure or table

- [`add_footer_pure()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/add_footer_pure.md)
  : Add success footer information item to item for the figure or table

- [`convert_xls_as_xlsx()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/convert_xls_as_xlsx.md)
  : Convert xls to xlsx

- [`convert_xls_to_xlsx()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/convert_xls_to_xlsx.md)
  : Helper function: convert_xls_to_xlsx

- [`delete_registry()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/delete_registry.md)
  : Helper function: delete_registry

- [`document_dt()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/document_dt.md)
  :

  Help Document the Variables List of Data Set for Package Development
  This function is deprecated after v0.1.0, please use
  [`help.document()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/help.document.md)
  instead.

- [`gen_dirs_vec()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/gen_dirs_vec.md)
  : Generate batch directories

- [`get_excelcnv_exe()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/get_excelcnv_exe.md)
  : Helper function: get_excelcnv_exe

- [`get_province_of_institution()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/get_province_of_institution.md)
  : Helper Function to match and get province of target institution

- [`get_vars()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/get_vars.md)
  : Get names from basic variables table

- [`gg2xlsx()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/gg2xlsx.md)
  : Export chunk plot to editable xlsx file

- [`safe_office_folder()`](https://huhuaping.github.io/techme/dev/reference/safe_office_folder.md)
  : Helper function: safe_office_folder
